form.formComment: Good performance to win by 3.5 lengths at this track over 601m (34.91) beating Red Hot Bonnie in Novice race on April 4. Was in the money two on end before breaking through last start. Stick with her.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 601m in 34.76 last start, beating Capalla. Has a strong record from box 8, including two wins. Go close.
